scripts.desktop:dev: npm run desktop:stage-runtime && npm run dev -w apps/desktop
scripts.desktop:build: npm run desktop:stage-runtime && npm run build -w apps/desktop
scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w packages/config && npm run build -w apps/api && npm run build -w apps/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w apps/api && npm run lint -w apps/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w packages/shared && npm run typecheck -w packages/config && npm run typecheck -w apps/api && npm run typecheck -w apps/web
